title: schizoglossum rubiginosum
intro: Schizoglossum rubiginosum, also known as the rusty-stemmed schizoglossum, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Schizoglossum rubiginosum include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and malaria, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce blood pressure. Traditionally, Schizoglossum rubiginosum is prepared as a herbal tea or infused in water to extract its medicinal properties.
